raw.fda483_excerpt: OBSERVATION 1 There is a failure to thoroughly review any unexplained discrepancy. The investigation did not extend to other potentially affected batches. OBSERVATION 2 Established sampling plans are not documented at the time of performance. Sampling records were completed after the operation.
